name: Beheira Governorate (Egypt)
description: A blue field charged at the centre with the Beheira Governorate emblem.
history: The flag of Beheira Governorate was adopted as part of the system of governorate flags introduced by the Egyptian government in the 2000s; it bears the governorate emblem on a Nile-blue field.

features.symbolism: a stylised emblem with agricultural and Nile-delta motifs surrounding the Arabic name of the governorate (al-Buhayra)
the Arabic word البحيرة ('al-Buhayra'), the name of the governorate
